kept.text:
Assembling the Leadership to Power the Next Generation of Humanoid Robots

To bring humanoid robots 🤖 like #Apollo into everyday use, you need more than great technology: you need leaders who have scaled it before.

As we prepare for our next phase of growth, we’ve bolstered our executive bench with veterans from the world’s most innovative tech giants like Waymo, Boston Dynamics, and Amazon.

Read more in @Forbes:  https://t.co/gjINmD6yb4

author.name: Apptronik
author.description: Apptronik develops humanoid robots that work alongside people doing the tasks that humans don't want to do.

kept.text:
JUST IN: Apptronik is stacking its C-suite with veterans from Waymo, Boston Dynamics, Amazon and iRobot, and has teased a BRAND NEW humanoid robot.

This is the company that closed a $ 935M Series A at a $5.3bn valuation in February. 

And now CEO Jeff Cardenas is building the machine that builds the machine.

Five senior hires spanning product, services, software, marketing and people operations, all poached from the companies that defined the last decade of tech.

This matters because talent is now the battleground in humanoid robotics. The winners are going to drain the best people away from everyone else. That's exactly what's happening here.

The competition is fierce.

The race is no longer about who can demo a robot folding laundry.

It's about who can support fleets of humanoids doing REAL work in production environments at scale.

And now a brand new robot is coming.

This is going to be one to watch very closely. 👀

@jeffcardn @Apptronik

~~ 

 ♻️ Join the weekly robotics newsletter, and never miss any news → https://t.co/GoA3ZuwWF9
